zh.Blagdon, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特布拉格頓
zh.Padstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾帕德斯托福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith de Prideaux於大約1340年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Roger de Prideaux II47歲，母親Joan Bigbury30歲。她於1350年與Thomas Scobell在英國薩默塞特布拉格頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1403年6月5日在英國戴文享年64歲。

zh-hans.Blagdon, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特布拉格頓
zh-hans.Padstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰可瓦爾帕德斯托福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith de Prideaux于大约1340年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Roger de Prideaux II47岁，母亲Joan Bigbury30岁。她于1350年与Thomas Scobell在英国薩默塞特布拉格頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1403年6月5日在英国戴文享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Prideaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from a place in the parish of Luxulyan, or perhaps the placename derives from the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith de Prideaux was born about 1340, in Cornwall, England, her father, Roger de Prideaux II, was 47 and her mother, Joan Bigbury, was 30. She married Thomas Scobell in 1350, in Blagdon, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 5 June 1403, in Devon, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith de Prideaux est née environ 1340, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Prideaux II, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Joan Bigbury, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Scobell en 1350, à Blagdon, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 juin 1403, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edith de Prideaux um 1340 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Prideaux II 47 und ihre Mutter Joan Bigbury 30. Sie hat 1350 in Blagdon, Somerset, England Thomas Scobell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 5. Juni 1403 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edith de Prideaux è nata il circa 1340 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Roger de Prideaux II, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Joan Bigbury, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Scobell nel 1350, nel Blagdon, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 5 giugno 1403, nel Devon, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.Blagdon, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトブラグドン
ja.Padstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingd: イギリスイギリスコルンワルプアドストウ
ja.lifeSummary: Edith de Prideauxが約1340年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Roger de Prideaux IIは47歳，母Joan Bigburyは30歳であった。1350年にイギリスソメルセトブラグドンでThomas Scobellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1403年6月5日にイギリスデボンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edith de Prideaux(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Prideaux II(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bigbury(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 서머세트 블래그던에서 Thomas Scobell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 6월 5일 영국 데폰에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Padstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingd: Lannwedhenek, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edith de Prideaux nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Prideaux II, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bigbury, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Scobell em 1350, em Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 5 de junho de 1403, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith de Prideaux родилась около 1340 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Prideaux II было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bigbury, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Scobell в 1350 г. в местности благдон, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 5 июня 1403 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edith de Prideaux nació aproximadamente 1340, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Prideaux II, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Joan Bigbury, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas Scobell en 1350, en Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 5 de junio de 1403, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
